variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with coughing?

variables.name: CP02
variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with chest pain or tightness?

variables.name: CPAP02
variables.description: Do you sleep with either a pressure mask (CPAP) or a mouthpiece as treatment for your sleep apnea?

variables.name: DRIVE02
variables.description: What is chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while driving?

variables.name: FUNRES02
variables.description: How often do you feel unrested during the day, no matter how many hours of sleep you had?

variables.name: HB02
variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with heartburn or indigestion?

variables.name: HOSTBR02
variables.description: How often do you have times when you stop breathing during your sleep?

variables.name: HRSWE02
variables.description: How many hours of sleep  do you usually get at night (or your main sleep period) on weekends or your non-workdays?

variables.name: INCAR02
variables.description: What is chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while in a car, while stopped for a few minutes in traffic?

variables.name: LEGCRP02
variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with leg cramps or leg jerks?

variables.name: LYDWN02
variables.description: What is chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while lying down to rest in the afternoon when circumstances permit?

variables.name: MDSA02
variables.description: Have you ever been told by a doctor that you have sleep apnea?

variables.name: MEMBHH02
variables.description: During the past year, how often have one or more members of your household been in or near the room where you slept?

variables.name: MI2SLP02
variables.description: How many minutes does it usually take you to fall asleep at bedtime?

variables.name: NAPS02
variables.description: During a usual week, how many times do you nap for 5 minutes or more?

variables.name: NEEDBR02
variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with the need to go to the bathroom?

variables.name: NGES02
variables.description: How often do you not get enough sleep?

variables.name: NOISE02
variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with noise in your surroundings?

variables.name: O2THPY02
variables.description: Do you usually use oxygen therapy while you sleep?

variables.name: PAINJT02
variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with pain in your joints, muscles, or back?

variables.name: PGRCAR02
variables.description: What is chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while as a passenger in a car for an hour without a break?

variables.name: SITLCH02
variables.description: What is the chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while sitting quietly after a lunch without alcohol?

variables.name: SITPUB02
variables.description: What is the chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while sitting inactive in a public place?

variables.name: SITRD02
variables.description: What is the chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while sitting and reading?

variables.name: SITTLK02
variables.description: What is the chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while sitting and talking to someone?

variables.name: SLEEPY02
variables.description: How often do you feel excessively (overly) sleepy during the day?

variables.name: SOB02
variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with shortness of breath?

variables.name: STPBRT02
variables.description: Are there times when you stop breathing during your sleep?

variables.name: SURGSA02
variables.description: Have you had surgery as treatment for your sleep apnea?

variables.name: SURGTR02
variables.description: Have you ever had surgery as treatment for your snoring?

variables.name: SWEATS02
variables.description: In the past year, how often, on average, have you been awakened with sweats or hot flashes?

variables.name: TFA02
variables.description: How often do you have trouble falling asleep?

variables.name: TFAWDA02
variables.description: At what time do you usually fall asleep on weekdays or workdays - AM or PM

variables.name: TFAWDH02
variables.description: At what time do you usually fall asleep on weekdays or workdays - hour?

variables.name: TFAWDM02
variables.description: At what time do you usually fall asleep on weekdays or workdays - minute?

variables.name: TFAWEA02
variables.description: At what time do you usually fall asleep on weekends or your non-work days - AM or PM

variables.name: TFAWEH02
variables.description: At what time do you usually fall asleep on weekends or your non-work days - hour?

variables.name: TFAWEM02
variables.description: At what time do you usually fall asleep on weekends or your non-work days - minute?

variables.name: TKPILL02
variables.description: How often do you take sleeping pills or other medication to help you sleep?

variables.name: TWUWDA02
variables.description: At what time do you usually wake up on weekdays or your work days - AM or PM

variables.name: TWUWDH02
variables.description: At what time do you usually wake up on weekdays or your work days - hour?

variables.name: TWUWDM02
variables.description: At what time do you usually wake up on weekdays or your work days - minute?

variables.name: TWUWEA02
variables.description: At what time do you usually wake up on weekends or your non-work days - AM or PM

variables.name: TWUWEH02
variables.description: At what time do you usually wake up on weekends or your non-work days - hour?

variables.name: TWUWEM02
variables.description: At what time do you usually wake up on weekends or your non-work days - minute?

variables.name: WATV02
variables.description: What is chance that you would doze off or fall asleep while watching TV?

variables.name: WU2EM02
variables.description: How often do you wake up too early in the morning and are unable to resume sleep?

variables.name: WUDNRS02
variables.description: How often do you wake up during the night and have difficulty resuming sleep?

variables.name: YRSSNR02
variables.description: For how many years have you been snoring?

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample aliases and substudy accessions.
